description_long: This hatchback car features a sharply angular, geometric design with a metallic gray exterior and dark-tinted windows. The body is constructed with flat, planar surfaces and a wedge-shaped profile, giving it a futuristic, armored appearance. The roof and rear window are composed of large, dark glass panels, while the wheels are robust with a polygonal, stylized rim design. The front end is minimalistic, with a wide windshield and narrow headlights integrated into the bodywork. The side profile reveals four doors and a continuous beltline, while the rear is characterized by a large, sloped hatch and a single red light bar. The overall aesthetic is reminiscent of the Tesla Cybertruck, emphasizing durability and modernity.
description: A futuristic, angular hatchback car with a metallic gray body, dark glass roof, and polygonal wheels, resembling the Tesla Cybertruck.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat windshield, narrow headlights, and sharply angled hood.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the wedge-shaped profile, four doors, and polygonal wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large, sloped hatch, dark rear glass, and a single red light bar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the wedge profile and door arrangement, emphasizing the continuous glass roof.
